meta.title: MIDSEA Academy — Christian bilingual K-12 education
meta.description: Florida-accredited Christian bilingual virtual school. PreK-12 curriculum with values, parent tools, and home-based learning.

meta.title: Course catalog — MIDSEA Academy
meta.description: See available HS pilot courses before signing up. Math, Language, English ESL, History, Science and Music with Christian worldview and neutral LATAM Spanish tone.

hero.title: See the catalog before signing up
hero.subtitle: Christian bilingual education for teens in grades 9-10. Activate the courses your child needs — no closed bundles, no forced subjects.
hero.transparencyNote: Core plan includes unlimited access to the catalog. Activate the courses your child will take — no extra cost per course.

list.heading: Pilot Mínimo courses
list.subheading: Each course is designed with a Christian worldview and an international curriculum. Lesson tone is neutral Latin American Spanish — no regional slang, no Argentine voseo, no peninsular vosotros.
list.empty: We're publishing the courses. Check back in a few days.

finalCta.title: Try Midsea with no commitment
finalCta.body: Create your account, activate a course for your child and start today. Cancel anytime.

hero.headline: Christian bilingual K-12 education, from home
hero.subheadline: MIDSEA Academy is a Florida-accredited virtual school. A complete K-12 curriculum, Christian values, and Spanish-English bilingual learning — all at home, without diluting your faith or your language.
hero.visualAlt: Fidelis, the MIDSEA Academy globe mascot

why.heading: Why MIDSEA Academy?
why.subheading: Four pillars that sustain an education with purpose.

faith.title: Faith-centered
faith.body: Education rooted in Christian values that nurture character and spirituality across every subject.

bilingual.title: Bilingual by design
bilingual.body: Learn in Spanish or English with no forced translations. Switch languages with one click.

flexible.title: Flexible & personalized
flexible.body: Your child advances at their own pace. You choose schedule, depth, and weekly planning.

accredited.title: Fully accredited
accredited.body: Official academic records. Transcripts valid for college admissions or re-entry into traditional schools.

curriculum.heading: A curriculum that grows with your child
curriculum.subheading: Common Core + LATAM standards integrated with Christian formation, adapted to each family's language.
curriculum.preK2Body: Foundations through play. Basic math, bilingual literacy, natural sciences, art, and Bible for kids.
curriculum.g35Body: Intermediate reinforcement. Fractions, reading comprehension, basic history, foreign language, and Bible study.
curriculum.g68Body: Advanced preparation. Algebra, academic writing, physical sciences, geography, and Christian formation.
curriculum.g912Body: Complete high school. Calculus, literature, chemistry, biology, world history, electives, and theology.

learners.heading: Built for all learners
learners.subheading: Visual, kinesthetic, auditory, or mixed styles — Midsea adapts.
learners.b1: Short videos, step-by-step practice, and immediate rewards.
learners.b2: Flexible schedule: your child moves at their own pace.
learners.b3: Text-to-speech, dark mode, and accessibility tweaks.
learners.b4: Moderated safe community to practice social skills.

parentTools.heading: Tools that empower parents
parentTools.subheading: From manager to director: full control in five minutes a day.
parentTools.b1: Assign lessons and set personalized schedules.
parentTools.b2: Real-time progress tracking with downloadable reports.
parentTools.b3: Unified dashboard for all your kids.
parentTools.b4: Notifications when they need extra support.

testimonials.heading: Christian families trusting MIDSEA Academy
testimonials.subheading: First voices from our community — churches, homeschoolers, and families of faith.

t1.quote: MIDSEA Academy gives us the flexibility to integrate our faith into every lesson. My kids grow up bilingual with clear values.
t1.name: María G.

t2.quote: As a Christian family we finally found a school with academic excellence that doesn't dilute our values. The Bible is part of the curriculum, not an add-on.
t2.name: Carlos R.

t3.quote: The curriculum includes Bible, and Florida accreditation gives us peace of mind for transcripts. Our church already recommends Midsea to other families.
t3.name: Pastor Andrés V.

pricing.heading: An AI tutor for every child. No surprises.
pricing.subheading: Pay per student. Each child gets their own Angela, MasteryMap and Learning Path. Cancel anytime.

core.name: Core
core.tagline: For families with one child or trying Midsea.

pro.name: Pro
pro.feat2: Automated regulatory reports (FL, TX, MX-SEP, ES-LOMLOE)
pro.feat3: Group sessions with a human tutor (4 per month)

family.name: Family
family.tagline: Big families. Flat pricing, no surprises.
family.feat5: No extra fees per additional student
family.disclaimer: If you have 5+ kids, contact us for a custom plan.

q1.question: How much does it cost if I have 2 kids?
q1.answer: On Core, $58/mo ($29 × 2). On Pro, $90/mo ($45 × 2). Each child gets their own progress, avatar, and Angela. If you have 3 or more kids, Family at $69/mo is the better fit.

q2.question: Can I change plans later?
q2.answer: Yes, anytime from the Parent Copilot. Changes are prorated on the next charge.

q3.question: Are refunds available?
q3.answer: No refunds for partial periods, but you can cancel anytime and access continues until the end of the period already paid.

q4.question: What if I pick annual and need to cancel after 3 months?
q4.answer: You can cancel and you keep access until the end of the paid year. We don't refund the unused fraction — that's why the 30% discount only applies when you commit to the full year.

q5.question: Do you accept payments from Mexico / LATAM?
q5.answer: Yes, we accept cards from any country. Prices are in USD. We'll soon add OXXO (Mexico) and local currency.

q6.question: What's included in "automated regulatory reports"?
q6.answer: We generate the formats your jurisdiction requires to validate homeschooling: SEP in Mexico, LOMLOE in Spain, Florida Compulsory Attendance Affidavit, Texas Notice of Intent, and the equivalent reports for the other states and countries we keep adding.

finalCta.heading: Start the homeschooling of the future today
finalCta.body: No credit card. No commitments. Just learning.

footer.brandTagline: Christian bilingual K-12 school, accredited in Florida.

common.comingSoonBody: This section will be available soon.

home.noLessons: No lessons assigned today. Take a break!

tutor.title: Ask for help with this lesson
tutor.placeholder: Tell me where you got stuck…
tutor.disclaimer: This chat is shared with your parent. It's here to help you, not do the lesson for you.

lesson.placeholderBody: Video, interactive activities and the assessment will live here. If you get stuck, tap Ask for help and Angela will guide you without giving the answer away.

activity.label: Activity {n}
activity.incorrectOrder: The order is not quite right.
activity.inputPlaceholderShort: Write your answer in one or two sentences
activity.shortOk: Your answer covers {hits} of {total} key ideas.
activity.shortMissed: You missed mentioning at least one of these ideas: {keywords}.
activity.stepHint: Reorder the steps using the arrow buttons.

quiz.title: Lesson assessment
quiz.subtitle: Answer {total} questions. You need 80% to master the lesson and earn Coin.
quiz.keepPracticing: Keep practicing — you're not at 80% yet.
quiz.coinAlreadyEarned: You had already mastered this lesson — Coin isn't doubled.
quiz.unauthorized: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
quiz.no_quiz_questions: This lesson doesn't have a quiz yet.

askAngela.label: Ask Angela for help
askAngela.hint: She'll guide you about this lesson without giving the answer.
askAngela.ariaLabel: Ask Angela for help with this lesson, {name}

dashboard.subheading: Pick where to start. Angela is with you in any of them.
dashboard.intentsHeading: What do you want to do?
dashboard.resumeHeading: Pick up where you left off
dashboard.resumeContext: You were here last — jump back in any time.
dashboard.noActivity: No activity yet. Pick an intent above to get started.
dashboard.courseCompleted: You completed every lesson in this course!

angela.openWithUnread: Angela has a suggestion for you
angela.disclaimer: This conversation is shared with your parent. Angela guides you, she doesn't hand you the answer.

placeholder.default: What do you want to talk about?

actionPrompt.hint: Can you give me a hint for this exercise without telling me the answer?
actionPrompt.example: Give me a similar example so I can understand better.
actionPrompt.explainAgain: Can you explain this in a simpler way?

proactive.errors: Looks like this is getting tricky. Need a hint?
proactive.timeExceeded: You've been on this for a while. Want me to walk you through it?

error.openai: Something tangled my thoughts. Can you try again in a minute?
error.rateLimit: We've talked a lot today — come back tomorrow. I'll rest up and explain everything again.

feedback.incorrect: Not yet. Try again or ask Angela for a hint.

completed.title: You finished the exercises!
completed.body: Nice work. Run them again to reinforce, or review with Angela.

stuck.title: I'm stuck
stuck.body: Tell Angela what tripped you up and she guides you step by step.
stuck.hint: No active blockers right now — drop in when you need help.
stuck.hintActive: Your last attempt on «{topic}» didn't land. Angela can guide you.
stuck.pageBody: Here Angela identifies your current lesson, reads your latest attempts, and guides you with hints — without giving away the answer. For now, inside any lesson you can tap «Ask the tutor for help» to open the same contextual flow.

prep.title: Practice for a test
prep.body: Angela builds an adaptive plan for your next assessment.
prep.hintActive: Test coming up in {days} days — Angela can build a plan.
prep.pageBody: Here Angela runs a short IRT diagnostic, identifies gaps, and builds a 3-5 day plan with micro-lessons and quizzes. Pending: IRT engine and calendar integration with the parent dashboard.

explore.title: Learn something new
explore.body: Follow your curiosity. Ask and discover.
explore.hint: Why is the sky blue? How do planes fly?
explore.pageBody: Here you ask anything you're curious about and Angela maps the answer back to the curriculum: she shows you the concept, suggests a short experiment or video, and connects it to formal lessons. Pending: competency ↔ curiosity mapping.

review.title: Review what I know
review.body: Reinforce what you've mastered with spaced repetition.
review.pageBody: Here Angela uses spaced repetition to schedule reviews based on when you learned something and how often you missed it. Pending: spaced-repetition engine (SM-2 or similar) and mastery map view.

gamification.masteryRequired: You need 80% mastery to earn COIN
